response.justification: The candidate brings valuable geospatial domain expertise and senior-level systems thinking, but has significant technical gaps for this role. C++ experience is dated (2014-2015), with recent focus on JavaScript/TypeScript and web/AI infrastructure rather than systems-level programming. No Rust experience. While the candidate demonstrates a growth mindset and willingness to expand expertise, the primary requirement of modern C++ development and the specific routing/navigation tile pipeline domain are both underrepresented on the resume.
strengths: Geospatial domain expertise from founding Northwind Labs and web GIS work at Green Map
Senior-level engineer with demonstrated systems thinking and willingness to learn across technology stacks
Strong DevOps and infrastructure background with Linux, Docker, CI/CD, and distributed systems exposure
concerns: C++ experience is over 10 years old (2014-2015); current primary focus is JavaScript/TypeScript and Node.js
No Rust experience mentioned, despite being listed as acceptable alternative for role
Geospatial background is GIS/web-oriented rather than routing optimization, tile pipelines, or real-time navigation systems
